indicators.name: couches
indicators.rationale: Couches are not suitable for computer work as they lack a flat surface and are designed for lounging.

indicators.name: low tables
indicators.rationale: Low tables are not suitable for computer work as they lack a flat surface and are designed for casual dining or coffee.

indicators.name: chandeliers
indicators.rationale: Chandeliers provide ambient lighting, which is not suitable for computer work as it can cause screen glare and eye strain.

indicators.name: large windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows allow natural light to enter, which can cause glare on computer screens and reduce visual comfort.

indicators.name: lack of dedicated workspace
indicators.rationale: The layout lacks a dedicated workspace, making it difficult to set up a computer workstation.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The presence of couches and low tables, along with chandeliers and large windows, makes it difficult to set up a dedicated workspace. The layout lacks a dedicated area for computer work, which is essential for focused knowledge work.
